reasoning: Both result sets contain the needed facts to answer the question correctly: Kamala Harris's memoir title is '107 Days,' and it was published/released on September 23, 2025. In B, NPR and AP clearly identify the new book as '107 Days,' and AP says it will be published by Simon & Schuster on Sept. 23; the Simon & Schuster business page also supports the title.
